title: Cat ears
description: Have you ever wanted to have cat ears in minecraft? That's what you need.
body:
# Features
Well yahh...
That resource pack just adds rename model, to get it, you need to rename a carved pumpkin into "Cat ears"

**"No pumpkin blur" is embedded**, so you don't need to install this.
# Localization:
En: rename into "Cat ears"

Ru: переименнуйте в "Кошачьи ушки"
# Recomendation
I find a mod "[RP renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)" very useful, when you use by the type of mine resource pack, so i highly recommend it to install.
# Preview
Just a screenshot, of how it looks ingame, on skin.
Check the gallery to see more!
![screeenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4bbedbaa32555316935d73ad8d8e33ac60e820.png)
